payload.summary: The application has been receiving mixed reviews, with some users praising its features and user experience, while others have been experiencing issues with performance, reliability, and customer support. The app's ability to provide a platform for investing in US stocks has been well-received, but some users have reported problems with account setup, transaction history, and nomination updates. To improve the overall user experience, it is essential to address these issues and provide more transparent and efficient customer support.
quotes: I love the app! It's a great concept and I like the app! The app is so much faster and more stable download.
The customer care service is extremely very poor and needs significant improvement.
Great app for International stocks to buy for everyone in India... Thank you IndMoney team...
action_items: Optimize the application's performance and reliability to minimize disruptions and improve the overall user experience
Enhance customer support by providing more responsive and efficient service, including addressing issues with account setup, transaction history, and nomination updates
Conduct a thorough review of the application's features and functionality to identify areas for improvement and ensure that it meets the evolving needs of its users
action_ideas: Optimize the application's performance and reliability to minimize disruptions and improve the overall user experience
Enhance customer support by providing more responsive and efficient service, including addressing issues with account setup, transaction history, and nomination updates
Conduct a thorough review of the application's features and functionality to identify areas for improvement and ensure that it meets the evolving needs of its users

explanation_bullets: A mutual fund exit load is a fee charged to investors when they redeem their units from a mutual fund scheme.
The exit load is usually a percentage of the redemption amount and is deducted from the investor's proceeds.
The purpose of an exit load is to discourage investors from withdrawing their money too quickly, thereby maintaining stability in the fund.
Exit loads are typically highest for redemptions made shortly after investment, and decrease or disappear over time.
The specific exit load structure and rates vary between different mutual fund schemes and are disclosed in the fund's offer document.
Investors should review the exit load details before investing in a mutual fund to understand the potential costs associated with early redemption.
A brokerage fee is a charge levied by a broker or financial intermediary for executing transactions on behalf of clients.
It is typically a percentage of the transaction amount or a flat fee per trade.
Brokerage fees can vary depending on the type of investment, such as stocks, bonds, or mutual funds.
These fees are usually deducted from the client's account at the time of transaction.
Brokerage fees can also include additional charges for services like research, advisory, or account maintenance.
The fee schedule is normally disclosed by the broker or financial institution to the client before initiating any transactions.

This syncing happens pretty much every time you open the app, start, stop, or edit an entry. Not to mention being unable to use the app when it's syncing because its literally stop responding until it's done. You'd stop an entry and wait several seconds, which made the app a pain. I love the app! It's a great concept and I like the app! The app so much faster and more stable download. I've used Keep on my phone and now on my laptop as well. You'd stop an entry and it'd be several seconds before it'd probably stop and those extra seconds are added to the entry. This syncing happens pretty much every time you open the app, start, stop, or edit an entry, so it was a real pain to use. But now downloads are much faster, the app feels smoother overall. Thank you so much! 🤑🤑
